SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-02-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:55am
Judge Pro Tem Bruce M. Lubarsky, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Theodore J. Thomas appearing as respondent in Pro Per, Baha Turker appears on behalf of the appellant. (Albert Marcu, appellant, is not present in court.) Mr. Turker appears to request a continuance on behalf of Mr. Marcu. Judge Lubarsky finds no good cause to continue the matter. Case is dismissed due to no appearance by the appellant.
